headline: Hermes keeps the engine warm while you are away.

modules.title: What I do every 30 minutes
modules.summary: Work cycle for the weekday email watcher running at :00 and :30 from 09:00 through 18:00.

cards.title: Step 1
cards.body: Poll Gmail via read-only OAuth; do not send, label, archive, or modify anything.

cards.title: Step 2
cards.body: Look back across recent mail and compare against Hermes last-seen state, not unread status.

cards.title: Step 3
cards.body: Filter obvious noise and spam-like patterns before surfacing anything.

cards.title: Step 4
cards.body: Detect likely action items and separate them from FYI mail.

cards.title: Step 5
cards.body: Send a Telegram update only when something relevant exists.

cards.title: Step 6
cards.body: Refresh this dashboard so the website stays aligned with the latest watcher state.

modules.title: Assistant status
modules.summary: The dashboard is meant to mirror current reality whenever work requires an update.

cards.title: Automation safety
cards.body: No email auto-replies or mailbox mutations are enabled.

cards.title: Sync policy
cards.body: When work changes dashboard-relevant state, I should update the website too.
